title: lilium ledebourii
intro: Lilium ledebourii, also known as Ledebour's lily or mountain lily, is a species of lily native to the mountainous regions of Turkey and Iran. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lilium ledebourii include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
